Executive - Agro Extension : Flixza Group Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Flixza Group Executive - Agro Extension Application Deadline : 14 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Age: 22 to 32 years Location: Dhaka (ECB Chottor) Published: 04 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 22 to 32 years Ability to collect field, market, and farmer data accurately Capability to perform both fieldwork and office-based documentation Basic understanding of crop cultivation practices and plant growth stages Knowledge of local agricultural culture, seasons, and farming systems Willingness to work in rural and remote areas Ability to maintain field visit records and daily work logs Physically fit for regular field visits and outdoor work Positive attitude, discipline, and respect for farmers and local communities Willingness to learn and adapt to new agricultural techniques Responsibilities & Context Job Context: eBagan , a concern of Flixza Group , is a Bangladesh-based agricultural e-commerce and agri-service platform committed to delivering quality agro inputs and technical support to farmers, gardeners, and agro-entrepreneurs across the country. We are currently seeking two (02) Agro Extension Executives (Male & Female) to strengthen our field operations. The selected candidates will work extensively in different regions of Bangladesh, providing hands-on agricultural guidance, promoting best practices, supporting customers, and acting as a bridge between field-level users and the company’s product and service offerings. Job Responsibilities Visit assigned field locations across Bangladesh to provide on-site technical support and advisory services to farmers, gardeners, and agro-entrepreneurs. Demonstrate and guide the proper use of seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, growth enhancers, tools, and other agro-related products. Identify farmers’ needs and recommend suitable products and cultivation practices in line with company guidelines. Collect field-level data, market insights, and customer feedback to support product improvement and business decisions. Conduct farmer meetings, training sessions, demonstrations, workshops, and awareness programs as assigned. Coordinate with the sales, marketing, and operations teams to support promotional campaigns and achieve organizational targets. Monitor crop conditions and pest and disease issues, and report findings with practical recommendations. Prepare and submit regular field visit reports, activity summaries, and market analysis to the management. Ensure professional representation of eBagan and maintain ethical standards in all field activities. Skills & Expertise Agriculture Extension Field Data Collection Horticulture

We provide strategic consulting, market research, sales development, and corporate training solutions tailored to each client’s needs. Business: Core Business Institute is a dynamic business development and consulting firm focused on empowering organizations to achieve sustainable growth and operational excellence. We work closely with startups, SMEs, and corporate organizations to design and implement effective business strategies, strengthen sales and marketing performance, and optimize overall business operations.

Our services include business strategy development, market research and analysis, sales process improvement, corporate training, and performance management solutions. By combining industry insights, data-driven approaches, and practical experience, Core Business Institute helps clients enhance efficiency, expand market presence, and achieve measurable results. Additional Requirements Age 24 to 35 years Responsibilities & Context Provide end-to-end expert counseling for students targeting the UK, Australia, NZ, Europe, and other destinations. Guide students from initial profile assessment all the way to visa application. Assess academic backgrounds and recommend the best-fit universities and courses. Engage with prospective students via calls, appointments, and follow-ups. Promote Education Seed's services and contribute to team enrollment targets. Stay updated on the latest admission and visa regulations. Skills & Expertise Good English communication skills (verbal and Written) Good Ms office and Emailing skill Leadership Multitasking Open to take responsibility Organizational Skills Proactive Attitude Proficient in English Working under pressure Suggested by Education Counseling Student Counseling Compensation & Other Benefits Mobile bill,Performance bonus Lunch Facilities: Full Subsidize Festival Bonus: 2 Weekly Leave: One and a half days of weekly holidays. Incentives: Commission provided for every successful student enrollment. Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka (Kalabagan) Company Information Education Seed Global Follow Address: 160, Lake Circus, Kalabagan, Dhaka-1205. Business: Education Seed Global is a UK based company specialized in overseas education services established in 2015. We the Education Seed Gloabl Team believe in ensuring a valuable service quality. We are one of the fastest- growing educational consultants and we are devoted towards maintaining outstanding levels of quality. Our excellent network with the Universities helps us to deliver superlative services to our customers. Our specialist admission department offers any assistance possible to guarantee your seat and facilitates the application process for our customers.
